overview: SP Jewelry is a cinematic luxury jewelry e-commerce storefront with a dramatic dark hero, 6 product categories, full product catalog, and guest checkout powered by Stripe.
features: Cinematic dark hero with jewel-tone accents and fade-in animations
6 jewelry category showcase (Rings, Necklaces, Bracelets, Earrings, Pendants, Sets)
Filterable and sortable product catalog with search
Product detail pages with image zoom and related products
Shopping cart with quantity controls and totals
Guest checkout with Stripe payment and order confirmation
